prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025年北京市综合类最低录取位次分别约为10705名、12798名、10168名、10213名、11426名，整体呈波动走势，2024–2025年从10213名后移至11426名，后 移约1200名，2025年基准位次约11426名；该校在北京市综合类招生计划2021–2025年均为33人，2026年计划仍为33人，连续六年招生计划持平，无扩 招或缩招，对竞争格局无直接影响。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 华北电力大学（保定）为211工程、双一流建设高校；软科中国大学排名2026年约第84名，近年排名稳定在75–84名区间，学 校层次保持稳定；该校在2021–2026年声誉舆情文件中均未被记录，无重大正面或负面舆情事件；抖音学校热度总排名未进入前106名，关注度一般；无投档断档 或异常记录，声誉层面无额外影响；第五轮学科评估中，电气工程获评A，动力工程及工程热物理获评A-，均为电力行业核心学科，对相关专业报考有较强吸引 力。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 电气工程及其自动化等核心专业社会热度持续较高；北京市2026年高考报名总人数约84,900人，较2025年65,434人大幅增加约29.7%，竞争显著加剧 ，是推动位次后移的最主要因素；学校位于河北省保定市，距北京市较近，属于邻省高校，北京考 生对该校认可度较高，地域偏好有利于维持报考热度。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合历年位次波动、招生计划连续六年持平、2026年北京考生总数大幅增加约30%等因素，在2025年基准1 1426名基础上，竞争加剧将推动最低录取位次后移；预测2026年最低位次约11726名，区间11226–12226名。

major_tier_recommendation.tier_1:
一档（最难进）
- 电气工程及其自动化（含创新班）
- 计算机科学与技术
- 软件工程。
major_tier_recommendation.tier_2:
二档（中等）
- 自动化
- 通信工程/电子信息科学与技术
- 能源与动力工程
- 储能科学与工程/氢能科学与工程
- 会计学。
major_tier_recommendation.tier_3:
三档（相对好进）
- 法学
- 行政管理/社会工作
- 外国语言文学类（英语/翻译）
- 工程造价/信息管理与信息系统。
major_tier_recommendation.overall_advice: 位次在预测区间11226–12226名内，建议以二档专业为主力填报、一档王牌专业（电气、计算机）冲刺、三档专业保底；位次明显优于区间下限（如11000名以内）可重点冲刺电 气工程及其自动化等A级学科专业。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum admission rankings for Beijing comprehensive category were approximately 10705, 12798, 10168, 10213, and 11426 respectively, showing a fluctuating trend. From 2024 to 2025, the ranking shifted backward from 10213 to 11426, a backward shift of about 1200 places. The baseline ranking for 2025 is approximately 11426. The enrollment plan for this university in Beijing's comprehensive category was 33 students each year from 2021 to 2025, and the 2026 plan remains 33 students. The enrollment plan has been stable for six consecutive years, with no expansion or reduction, having no direct impact on the competitive landscape.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: North China Electric Power University (Baoding) is a 211 Project and Double First-Class construction university. In the 2026 Soft Science China University Rankings, it is approximately 84th, with recent rankings stable in the 75–84 range, maintaining a stable university level. The university has not been recorded in any reputation or public opinion files from 2021 to 2026, with no major positive or negative public opinion incidents. The overall popularity ranking on Douyin (TikTok) has not entered the top 106, indicating average attention. There are no records of admission cut-off gaps or anomalies, so there is no additional impact from reputation. In the fifth round of discipline evaluation, Electrical Engineering was rated A, and Power Engineering and Engineering Thermophysics was rated A-, both core disciplines in the electric power industry, which strongly attract applicants to related majors.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Core majors such as Electrical Engineering and Automation continue to have high social popularity. The total number of Beijing college entrance examination registrants in 2026 is approximately 84,900, a significant increase of about 29.7% compared to 65,434 in 2025, leading to intensified competition, which is the most important factor driving the backward shift in rankings. The university is located in Baoding City, Hebei Province, relatively close to Beijing, making it a neighboring provincial university. Beijing candidates have a high recognition of this university, and regional preference helps maintain application enthusiasm.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering factors such as historical ranking fluctuations, the enrollment plan being stable for six consecutive years, and the significant increase of about 30% in the total number of Beijing candidates in 2026, based on the 2025 baseline of 11426, intensified competition will push the minimum admission ranking backward. The predicted minimum ranking for 2026 is approximately 11726, with a range of 11226–12226.

major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_1:
Tier 1 (Most Difficult)
- Electrical Engineering and Automation (including Innovation Class)
- Computer Science and Technology
- Software Engineering.
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_2:
Tier 2 (Medium)
- Automation
- Communication Engineering / Electronic Information Science and Technology
- Energy and Power Engineering
- Energy Storage Science and Engineering / Hydrogen Energy Science and Engineering
- Accounting.
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_3:
Tier 3 (Relatively Easy)
- Law
- Administrative Management / Social Work
- Foreign Language and Literature (English/Translation)
- Engineering Cost / Information Management and Information Systems.
major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: If your ranking is within the predicted range of 11226–12226, it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 majors as the main choice, aim for Tier 1 flagship majors (Electrical Engineering, Computer Science) as a stretch, and use Tier 3 majors as safety options. If your ranking is significantly better than the lower limit of the range (e.g., within 11000), you can focus on aiming for A-level discipline majors such as Electrical Engineering and Automation.
